since_last: 64% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.13%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.35% · BTC +1.12% · Gold +0.07% · Nasdaq100 +0.88%. 64% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.13%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.13%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.12%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +5.88%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +5.88%, TER +5.43%, BABA +5.41%, AMBA +5.33%, BIDU +4.75%. Laggards: ORCL -3.60%, AI -2.81%, TLN -2.66%, AAPL -2.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.69% at $123.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
